activities_projects.title: Understanding Health Through a Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand how lifestyle and environment affect health
steps: Read the story about a Grade 8 student who moved to a new city
Identify the problems faced by the student
Discuss how habits like excessive screen time affected health
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand that physical, mental, and social factors influence health
activities_projects.evaluation: Ability to explain causes of health problems (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Healthy and Unhealthy Habits List
activities_projects.objective: Identify daily habits that promote good health
steps: List healthy habits encouraged by parents or teachers
List unhealthy habits such as junk food or excessive screen time
Compare which habits you already follow
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize the importance of healthy lifestyle habits
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness of lists and reflection (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Clean vs Dirty Environment Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Understand the impact of environment on health
steps: Observe two playground pictures (clean and dirty)
Write which playground is healthier
Explain how pollution and dirt can cause diseases
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the importance of cleanliness and sanitation

activities_projects.title: Communicable Diseases Research
activities_projects.objective: Identify diseases, symptoms, and preventive measures
steps: Choose diseases such as common cold, measles, and typhoid
Identify the causal agent and symptoms
Write preventive measures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how infectious diseases spread and how to prevent them

activities_projects.title: Lifestyle Disease Survey
materials: Interview with doctor or family member
steps: Identify common lifestyle diseases in your community
Write symptoms of diseases such as diabetes or obesity
Suggest lifestyle changes to prevent them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn causes and prevention of lifestyle diseases
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of survey and suggestions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Community Sanitation Case Study
steps: Read the case study of sanitation campaign in Odisha
Write how improved sanitation reduced diseases
Discuss similar initiatives in your area
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn how community actions improve public health

activities_projects.title: Disease Prevention Poster
steps: Create a poster showing ways to prevent diseases
Include hygiene, vaccination, and healthy lifestyle
Display the poster in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to communicate health awareness visually
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and accuracy of message (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vaccination Awareness Activity
steps: Research vaccines such as polio, measles, and hepatitis
Explain how vaccines train the immune system
Discuss why vaccination is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand immunity and vaccine benefits

activities_projects.title: Health Diary Project
steps: Record daily food, exercise, sleep, and screen time for one month
Write observations about healthy and unhealthy patterns
Suggest improvements
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness about their own health habits
activities_projects.evaluation: Consistency and reflection in diary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: School Health Campaign
steps: Plan key health messages for students
Include prevention of communicable and lifestyle diseases
Present the campaign in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn leadership and health awareness
